examples: The woman took out her chequebook and quickly made out four cheques.
The number on the card should be identical with the one on the chequebook.
Call it chequebook expiation, kill and pay: it clearly works.
Estimates of the number who are without a current (ie, chequebook) account range as high as 23%.
But he won hearts, if not minds, by throwing lavish parties and opening his chequebook to British causes.
